metadata.description: fable-to-opus — an adapt-first playbook that helps any Claude model pick up Fable's effective work habits, by auditing your own harness instead of force-injecting rules

plugins.name: fable-to-opus
plugins.description: Adapt-first, not blind-install. Ships six portable work-method patterns distilled from a 31MB Fable-5-vs-Opus-4.8 transcript comparison, plus a skill that audits YOUR CLAUDE.md / skills / harness and proposes where each pattern belongs. Honest about what does NOT transfer (most tool-count differences were role/phase confounds, not model superiority).
